mapper.sql: id, name, dept_id, head, sub_source, sub_no, app_funds_amt, gra_funds_amt, start_date, end_date, con_date, rely_unit, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, audit_user_id, audit_date, proj_status, remark, sys_no, issued_date, proj_class, year, proj_fund_gov, proj_fund_own, prj_fund_matched, is_govbuy, alert_percent, monograph_num, paper_num, patent_num, is_ethical_approval, is_delay, delay_date, delay_data_state, delay_audit_state, our_unit_ranking, department, out_person, budg_total_amt, act_pay_wait_amt, act_pay_amt, score, au_dept_id, partistr, discipline, research_type, research_field, english_name, proj_level, is_human_genetic_res_required, is_changed, division_code, head_code, head_name, head_type_code, proj_sub_type, classCode, source_unit_name, authorize_date, authorize_sn, product_mode_code, industry_code, proj_cooperate_code, proj_orgform_code, creator_code, proj_dependence_type_code, contract_type_code, proj_secrect_level_code, proj_orgnize_unit, proj_stat_source_code, authorize_fee_amt, operate_time, tel, partner_name, partner_type_code, partner_address, partner_area, partner_zip_code, partner_tel, partner_representative, pay_type_code, finish_note, self_raised_funds, enterprise_funds, file_number, approval_number, acceptance_date, appraisal_date, project_account, special_funds, socio_economic_obj_code, national_economy_industry, proj_type, contract_role, contacts, is_transform_contract, project_id
mapper.select:
select sci.id as rowId,sci.name as name,sci.year as "year.id",csy.name as "year.name", sci.head as "head.id",huser.name as "head.name", sci.dept_id as "deptId.id",sdept.name as "deptId.name", sci.head_type_code as "headTypeCode.id",ccspt.name as "headTypeCode.name",sci.authorize_fee_amt as authorizeFeeAmt, sci.classCode as classCode,sci.proj_class as projClass, sci.proj_level as "projLevel.id",cspl.name as "projLevel.name", sci.proj_type as "projType.id",cspt.name as "projType.name", sci.sub_no as subNo,sci.file_number as fileNumber,sci.start_date as startDate,sci.appraisal_date as appraisalDate, sci.issued_date as issuedDate,sci.end_date as endDate,sci.acceptance_date as acceptanceDate, sci.proj_status as projStatus,sci.special_funds as specialFunds,sci.project_account as projectAccount, sci.enterprise_funds as enterpriseFunds,sci.data_status as dataStatus, sci.contract_category as contractCategory, sci.remark as remark, sci.tel as tel,sci.partner_name as partnerName, csptn.code as "partnerTypeCode.id",csptn.name as "partnerTypeCode.name", sci.partner_address as partnerAddress,sci.partner_area as partnerArea,sci.partner_zip_code as partnerZipCode, sci.partner_tel as partnerTel,sci.partner_representative as partnerRepresentative, sci.is_transform_contract as isTransformContract, csnei1.code as "nationalEconomyIndustry.id",csnei1.name as "nationalEconomyIndustry.name", csnei2.code as "nationalEconomyIndustryMiddle.id",csnei2.name as "nationalEconomyIndustryMiddle.name", csnei3.code as "nationalEconomyIndustrySmall.id",csnei3.name as "nationalEconomyIndustrySmall.name", cspcf.code as "projCooperateCode.id",cspcf.name as "projCooperateCode.name", csseo.code as "socioEconomicObjCode.id",csseo.name as "socioEconomicObjCode.name", cspof.code as "projOrgformCode.id",cspof.name as "projOrgformCode.name", fdiscipline.code as "discipline.id",fdiscipline.name as "discipline.name", csct.code as "contractTypeCode.id",csct.name as "contractTypeCode.name", cscr.code as "contractRole.id",cscr.name as "contractRole.name", spi.id as "projectId.id",spi.name as "projectId.name",spi.tel as tel,spi.file_number as fileNumber,spi.proj_status as projStatus from srm_contract_info sci left join srm_projects_info spi on spi.id=sci.project_id left join ct_srm_proj_type cspt on cspt.code=sci.proj_type left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=sci.year left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=sci.dept_id left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=sci.head left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=sci.discipline left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=sci.head_type_code left join ct_srm_proj_level cspl on cspl.code=sci.proj_level left join ct_srm_partner_type csptn on csptn.code=sci.partner_type_code left join ct_srm_national_economy_industry csnei1 on csnei1.code= sci.national_economy_industry left join ct_srm_national_economy_industry csnei2 on csnei2.code= sci.national_economyIndustry_middle left join ct_srm_national_economy_industry csnei3 on csnei3.code= sci.national_economyIndustry_small left join ct_srm_project_cooperation_form cspcf on cspcf.code=sci.proj_cooperate_code left join ct_srm_soc_economic_obj csseo on csseo.code=sci.socio_economic_obj_code left join ct_srm_project_org_form cspof on cspof.code=sci.proj_orgform_code left join ct_srm_contract_type csct on csct.code=sci.contract_type_code left join ct_srm_contract_role cscr on cscr.code=sci.contract_role
where sci.id=#{rowId}

select spi.id as rowId,spi.name as name,csy.name as yearName, huser.name as headName,sdept.name as deptName, spi.issued_date as issuedDate,spi.end_date as endDate,spi.acceptance_date as acceptanceDate, spi.proj_status as projStatus,spi.special_funds as specialFunds,spi.project_account as projectAccount, spi.enterprise_funds as enterpriseFunds,spi.data_status as dataStatus,spi.sub_date as subDate from srm_contract_info spi left join ct_srm_proj_type cspt on cspt.code=spi.proj_type left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=spi.year left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=spi.dept_id left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=spi.head left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=spi.discipline left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=spi.head_type_code left join ct_srm_proj_level cspl on cspl.code=spi.proj_level left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=spi.sub_user_id left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no=spi.sys_no and eafrec.check_rec_id=spi.id where eafrec.step_no>1
and ((spi.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{contractInfoDto.userId}, '|%')) or (eafrec.step_no = (select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where spi.sys_no=seafrec.sys_no and seafrec.check_rec_id=spi.id) and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{contractInfoDto.userId}, '|%') and eafrec.check_datetime is not null) or (spi.data_status=0 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.check_result=3 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{contractInfoDto.userId}, '|%')) )
and spi.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{contractInfoDto.userId}, '|%')
and spi.data_status=1 and eafrec.check_result="2" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{contractInfoDto.userId}, '|%')
and spi.data_status=0 and eafrec.check_result="3" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{contractInfoDto.userId}, '|%')
and spi.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractInfoDto.name}, '%')
and spi.sub_date >= #{contractInfoDto.startDate}
and spi.sub_date <= #{contractInfoDto.endDate}
order by eafrec.id desc

select spsg.id as rowId,csy.name as yearName, scif.name as contractName,spsg.project_id as contractId, csu.name as applyUserName, scif.sub_date as subDate,spsg.note as note, spsg.audit_status as auditStatus,spsg.data_status as dataStatus from srm_project_solicit_grade spsg left join srm_contract_info scif on scif.id=spsg.project_id left join ct_srm_user csu on csu.id=scif.sub_user_id left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=scif.year where spsg.expert=#{contractInfoDto.userId} and spsg.sys_no=#{contractInfoDto.sysNo}
and scif.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractInfoDto.name}, '%')
